title: Lunathyrium × lobatocrenatum
taxonomy: Lunathyrium × lobatocrenatum is a hybrid species within the fern family, specifically within the genus Lunathyrium. It is a result of the cross-breeding between Lunathyrium japonicum and Lunathyrium crenatum. This plant is primarily classified under the kingdom Plantae, and further classified under the divisions Pteridophyta and Polypodiopsida. More specifically, it is classified under the class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, and family Athyriaceae. The classification of Lunathyrium × lobatocrenatum reflects its unique characteristics and genetic makeup.
